description: Maintain a centralized inventory of endpoints, servers, cloud assets, and applications with ownership metadata.
kpi: 95% of production assets discovered within 24 hours

description: Track authorized software and SaaS usage including versioning, licensing, and business owners.
kpi: 100% tier-1 applications mapped to owners

description: Document critical services, dependencies, and data flows to support risk-informed protection decisions.
kpi: All crown-jewel services have approved dependency maps

description: Maintain risk intake, scoring, acceptance, and escalation workflows with quarterly governance reviews.
kpi: 90% of identified risks triaged within 10 business days

description: Perform threat modeling for major system changes and new applications before production release.

description: Assess critical vendors for security, privacy, and resiliency controls before onboarding and annually thereafter.

description: Publish and annually review information security policies, standards, and control procedures.
kpi: 100% mandatory policy reviews completed on schedule

description: Define and communicate security responsibilities across first, second, and third lines of defense.

description: Enforce least privilege, just-in-time elevation, and session recording for privileged accounts.

kpi: 100% critical apps complete quarterly access reviews

description: Classify data by sensitivity and enforce handling requirements across storage and collaboration tools.

description: Apply strong encryption for databases, object storage, and endpoint disk volumes containing sensitive data.
kpi: 99% sensitive data stores encrypted at rest

description: Enforce modern TLS configuration and certificate lifecycle management for internal and external services.
kpi: 95% of internet-facing services meet TLS baseline

description: Harden systems and cloud resources using approved baseline templates and CIS-aligned controls.

description: Conduct authenticated scanning, prioritize findings by exploitability, and track remediation SLAs.

description: Deploy EDR with behavioral prevention and centralized policy management across enterprise endpoints.

description: Deliver role-based security awareness and phishing simulations with completion tracking.

description: Aggregate security telemetry from endpoints, identity systems, cloud platforms, and critical apps.

description: Define severity-based triage workflows with escalation criteria and evidence preservation steps.

description: Monitor anomalous user and service-account behavior across identity and endpoint telemetry.

description: Continuously discover and assess internet-exposed assets for misconfigurations and known vulnerabilities.

description: Ingest vetted threat intelligence and map indicators to preventive and detective controls.

description: Track detection efficacy through false-positive rates, dwell time, and purple-team validation.
